main.description: A published Fluoddity breeder run — one expedition through phase space. Captures the starting config, the scoring function used (default or user-supplied JS body), the trajectory of every individual evaluated (canonical 4-D descriptor coordinates + fitness, by generation), and the breeder knobs. Aggregated across users by 'the forest', they're the emergent atlas of where exploration goes and what scoring lenses pull it where.

schemaVersion.description: Expedition schema version, so future engine changes can migrate old runs.

start.description: JSON-serialized starting config (the seed organism the run was launched from, or the random gen-0 representative if unseeded). Same shape as a com.minomobi.fluoddity.organism record's config field.

scorer.description: The scoring code that drove parent selection. Literal JS function body — variables in scope are v, fit, nov, align, verdict, gen, config; returns a number. The string 'default' means the built-in composite (fit + lambda*nov + mu*align) was used.

scorerHash.description: First 12 hex chars of sha-256(scorer). Lets the forest group expeditions that used the same scoring lens, across users.

trajectory.description: JSON array of every evaluated individual. SchemaVersion 1: [id, parentId|null, gen, fit, fill, motion, struct, blowout]. SchemaVersion 2 (tier-0 two-snapshot): [id, parentId|null, gen, fit, fill, motion, struct, blowout, dfill, dmotion, dstruct, dblowout] — the four static descriptors are at T1 (settle 280), the four deltas are (T2 - T1) measured after another ~200 steps. The eight axes (4 static + 4 delta) form the canonical phase-space coordinates for rubric scoring; viewers that only need the static slice (indices 4..7) keep working unchanged.

knobs.description: JSON snapshot of the breeder knobs (tau, lambda, mu, mutRate, popSize) at run time.

generations.description: Number of generations completed in the published portion of the run.

picks.description: Optional at-uris of organisms the user promoted to the garden from this run.

parent.description: Optional at-uri of a previous expedition this one branched from.

forest.description: Constant link target (a DID) so the global backlink index (Constellation) can enumerate every expedition across users. Always did:web:g.mino.mobi — the same anchor the gallery uses, but under a different field path so the two collections enumerate independently.
